rows.label: qev025805_MSG0004
rows.name:
There are those who criticize our activities.
But are those people capable of saving
the Ma-non suffering from illness?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025805_MSG0005
rows.name:
They cannot, can they? One miracle
speaks louder than a multitude of
words... That is our creed, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025805_MSG0006
rows.name:
If you ever require God's miracle, please
knock on the church's door anytime.[ST:wait ]
